findings.message: New data-store write path with no metric or span instrumentation. The delete_items_by_prefix() function performs a database mutation without observability instrumentation, making the operation invisible to monitoring and tracing systems.
findings.suggestion: Instrument the delete operation with metrics (e.g., rows_deleted counter) and spans to track latency and success/failure. Consider adding correlation ID logging and integrating with the observability middleware patterns used elsewhere in the codebase.
